target.baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass65-eval-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/ --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1
target.rebench_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass65-concat-bench cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/concat_axis --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1

lever.summary: Add LiteralBufferStorage::Concat and route eval_concatenate through lazy buffer slices instead of eagerly copying output blocks.

isomorphism.ordering: Row-major concat block order is unchanged; the lazy storage records the exact source slices in evaluation order.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: No tie-breaking surface exists for Concatenate.
isomorphism.floating_point: No arithmetic is introduced or reordered; F64 bit patterns are copied only during materialization.
isomorphism.errors: Existing dtype, rank, dimension, shape, element-count, and checked-size errors are preserved; concat slice construction adds fail-closed overflow validation.

focused_tests.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass65-core-tests2 cargo test -p fj-core concat_pass65 -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass65-lax-tests2 cargo test -p fj-lax concatenate_pass65 -- --nocapture

quality_gates.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass65-check2 cargo check -p fj-core -p fj-lax --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass65-clippy2 cargo clippy -p fj-core -p fj-lax --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

quality_gates.result: nonzero from existing file-wide findings; no introduced pass65 panic/expect surface remained after cleanup
